title: Trump claims ‘active’ peace talks with Iran as bombing deadline approaches
summary_full: The president has given Iranian officials until 8 p.m. Tuesday to make a ceasefire deal or face widespread destruction. Tehran on Monday reasserted its rejection of U.S. demands.
summary_public: The president has given Iranian officials until 8 p.m. Tuesday to make a ceasefire deal or face widespread destruction. Tehran on Monday reasserted its rejection of U.S. demands.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump claims ‘active’ peace talks with Iran as bombing deadline approaches
